title: "Failed to resolve identifier XXX for width detection" with System Verilog interface element

features.name: interface with modport and signal access through modport hierarchy in case
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog interface with a modport declaration containing an input signal, where the interface signal is accessed through the modport hierarchy in a case statement expression

features.name: interface signal assignment to local variable for width resolution
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog interface signal accessed through modport hierarchy being assigned to a local variable, which serves as a workaround for width detection issues
